title: I Am Safe and Protected as Wealth Grows
subtitle: An affirmation for replacing the fear of visibility in prosperity with a settled sense of security
excerpt: A brief affirmation from Day 66 of a 12-week money program. The statement addresses the fear that being wealthy makes you exposed or vulnerable to others. It works with safety as something that grows alongside abundance, not something that gets traded for it.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 66 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A brief affirmation for Day 66 of a 12-week money program. The Day 66 script targets the belief that wealth invites danger, jealousy, pressure, intrusion, loss of privacy. This affirmation works with the idea that safety and prosperity grow together, not in opposition.
Say it three times in the morning. The second line is the one most people resist, say it slowly.
I am safe and protected as wealth grows. Prosperity brings freedom, not exposure. I live with quiet confidence in abundance.
Adapted from the Day 66 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
